name: wps-connector
description: Connect Codex to open WPS Writer and Spreadsheet documents through a local WPS bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Control bound WPS Writer and Spreadsheet sessions from Codex.
interface.longDescription: WPS Connector bundles a Codex skill, MCP server, and local runtime installer for connecting Codex to open WPS Writer and Spreadsheet documents through a local bridge.
defaultPrompt: Confirm the current WPS Connector session.
Read the current WPS Writer selection.
Read and verify the selected WPS Spreadsheet range.
